---
output: html_document
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

# Tables needed

## Gang's tables

1.  Salary and headcount
    -   salary_headcount_table
2.  Separation tables
    -   term_rate_age
    -   mort_table
3.  Entrant Profile
    -   entrant_profile_table
4.  Mortality Tables (Retirees)
    -   mort_retire_table
5.  Normal Retirement Rate
    -   normal_retire_rate_table
6.  Early Retirement Rate
    -   early_retire_rate_table
7.  Separation Rate Tables
    -   separation_rate_table
8.  Salary growth rate table
    -   salary_growth_table

## Formats

### salary_headcount_table

![](images/clipboard-1969995984.png)

### term_rate_age

![](images/clipboard-3479558445.png){width="523"}

### mort_table

![](images/clipboard-61814095.png)

### entrant_profile_table

![](images/clipboard-3688103912.png)

### mort_retire_table

![](images/clipboard-85038419.png)

### normal_retire_rate_table

![](images/clipboard-2594117173.png)

### early_retire_rate_table

![](images/clipboard-2802893458.png)

### separation_rate_table

![](images/clipboard-3151827964.png)

### salary_growth_table

![](images/clipboard-2703049918.png)

### 

```{r stop_here, echo=FALSE}
knitr::knit_exit()
```
